name: Hon. C.V. Wigneswaran, M.P.
academic_qualifications: B.A. (London University ) ; LLB. (Ceylon University ); Completed Proctors' Final and Advocates' Final at Law College, Colombo; Attorney-at-Law
professional_qualifications: Proctors' Final Advocates'; Attorney-at-Law; Former Lecturer, Law College; In active Practice from 1965 to 1979; Joined the Judicial Service on 7 May 1979; Magistrate and District Judge - Batticaloa, Chavakachcheri and Mallakam; District Judge Colombo in January 1987; High Court Judge 1988, serving in Northern Province, Eastern, North Central, Uva and Western Provinces; Judge Court of Appeal in 1995; Former SC Judge; Former CM Northern Province
